record.field: issues = env['esg.compliance.issue'].search([('status', 'in', ['open', 'in_progress']), ('due_date', '<', fields.Date.today())]) for issue in issues: # Schedule activity (if not already scheduled to avoid duplicates, but for simplicity we just schedule) issue.activity_schedule( 'mail.mail_activity_data_todo', user_id=issue.owner_id.id, summary='OVERDUE: Compliance Issue', date_deadline=fields.Date.today() ) issue.message_post(body="This issue is now overdue.", subtype_xmlid='mail.mt_note')
